CONTENT.Career: Born in Hrudky, Volyn Oblast, Kozik began his career in the neighbouring VIK-Volyn Volodymyr-Volynskyi academy school system, before transferring to the Shakhtar Donetsk academy in 2019.He played in the Ukrainian Premier League Reserves for several seasons and made his debut for the senior Shakhtar Donetsk squad in the Ukrainian Premier League, coming on as a substitute in the 82nd minute for Valeriy Bondar in a 3-0 home victory over Inhulets Petrove on 5 November 2022.
CONTENT.External links: Eduard Kozik at UAF and archived FFU page (in Ukrainian)Eduard Kozik at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Eduard Serhiyovych Kozik (Ukrainian: Едуард Сергійович Козік; born 19 April 2003) is a Ukrainian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Karpaty Lviv, on loan from Shakhtar Donetsk.
